title: Prosperplast Flower pots, Multicolored, One Size
features: Prosperplast Flower pots, Multicolored, One Size
description: From the manufacturer Planters with a nice thick knitted effect. Soft feeling full of light. The Splofy & Knitted collection planters are made from high quality, durable and sturdy plastic with a design that mimics a beautiful traditional loose weave of thick and soft yarn reminiscent of a knitted jumper with a pleasant touch effect that reflects light in a fascinating way offering unlimited concepts of use, adding style and freshness to your surroundings. Thanks to the large variety of sizes in delicate pastel and neutral colours, endless options for decorating both indoors and outdoors in a modern or classic trend, it will successfully fit into any composition.
